description:
The Verify Join Request node listens for join requests when users join a world with an enabled join verification system, firing an event when it happens. This node returns a set of information that contains info of the joining user. This node can be combined with the Allow Join, Deny Join, and Assign Role nodes.

To activate a join verification system, a user needs to open the node in a Scene Inspector and go to the VerifyJoinRequest component. The bottom of the component has a button labeled "Set as custom join request verifier" and a warning letting users know that this feature does not prevent tampering of worlds that use this feature.

The following is the exact warning inside this node:

fields.Verify: Fires when a user is wanting to join the world.
fields.UserID: The user ID that is wanting to join the world.
fields.UserSessionID: The user session ID that the user is coming from.
fields.MachineID: The user machine ID that is wanting to join the world.
fields.Username: The username that is wanting to join the world.
fields.HeadOutputDevice: The joining user's head output device.
fields.IsInvited: Returns if this joining user was invited.
fields.IsContact: Returns if this joining user is in the host's contacts list.
fields.IsInKioskMode: Returns if this joining user is in kiosk mode.
fields.IsSpectatorBanned: Returns if this joining user was banned as a spectator.
fields.IsMuteBanned: Returns if this joining user was banned and muted.
fields.Handle: Returns this join request as a type.
